name: Baked Halibut Limone
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Halibut, cut into 6 serving pieces, 3/4 inch thick
2 Lemons, sliced, plus 2 more for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Sprinkle both sides of the fish with salt, pepper, and paprika.
3. Place fish in a buttered shallow baking dish and sprinkle with garlic, parsley, and breadcrumbs.
4. Arrange lemon slices on top of the fish and add water almost to the top of the fish.
5. Bake uncovered for 20-30 minutes until the fish is firm and the crumbs are golden brown.
6. Remove lemon slices, dot the remaining fish with butter, and place under the broiler until browned.
7. Garnish with thin lemon slices. Serves 6.
